name: enforce dispatches the documentation rule through the standards catalog to its detector
command:
printf '# 0001. choose x
- Status: accepted
## Context
why.
## Decision
chose x. Grounding sources: aws-well-architected.
## Consequences
trade-offs.
' > 0001-x.md
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce.sh --root . --rule g-doc-001 --json 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'adr-structure.sh' && echo doc-rule-in-catalog 1>&2
